author: doll-agent
content:
Add 6 property tests to ferray-linalg/tests/property_tests.rs covering Cholesky and LU invariants:
Cholesky (SPD construction A = X*X^T + n*I): L*L^T == A, lower-triangular structure, positive diagonal.
LU (diag-dominant for non-singularity): P*A == L*U, L unit-lower-triangular, U upper-triangular.
256 cases each via existing ProptestConfig.
